payload.cmd_preview:
# Show files, then display CRS/info for each dataset
ls -l /app/data && \
echo "=== Polygon layer CRS ===" && ogrinfo -al -so /app/data/*.shp && \
echo "=== Raster DEM info ===" && gdalinfo /app/data/

# Create output directory and run the full pipeline
mkdir -p /app/output && \
# 1. Reproject vector zones to EPSG:3035 (GeoPackage)
ogr2ogr -t_srs EPSG:3035 -f GPKG /app/output/zones_3035.gpkg /app/da

# Reproject CSV points (lon/lat EPSG:4326) to target CRS EPSG:3035 and perform spatial check
ogr2ogr -f GPKG -s_srs EPSG:4326 -t_srs EPSG:3035 \
  -oo X_POSSIBLE_NAMES=longitude -oo Y_POSSIBLE_NAMES=l

# Complete the remaining pipeline steps
set -e

# 4. Rasterize zones to match reprojected DEM (same extent, pixel size, dimensions)
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, subprocess, shlex, os, sys
dem_path =
